summary: Safety Brain (Phase 43) - All backend APIs and frontend components tested successfully. 23/23 backend tests passed. Frontend Safety Brain Dashboard fully functional with risk gauge, signal breakdown, events list. EmergencyMap integration with Safety Brain card/marker implemented. SSE handler for safety_risk_alert working in FamilyDashboard.

backend_api.POST /api/safety-brain/evaluate (normal: PASS - Low signals → normal level, NO event created
backend_api.POST /api/safety-brain/evaluate (suspici: PASS - Medium signals → suspicious (0.3-0.6), event created
backend_api.POST /api/safety-brain/evaluate (dangero: PASS - High signals → dangerous (0.6-0.85), event created, NO auto_sos
backend_api.POST /api/safety-brain/evaluate (critica: PASS - Max signals → critical (>=0.85), event created, auto_sos=true
backend_api.Weight calculation: PASS - fall*0.35 + voice*0.30 + route*0.15 + wander*0.10 + pickup*0.10 verified
backend_api.Primary event tracking: PASS - Highest contributing signal identified correctly
backend_api.Invalid signal filtering: PASS - Unknown signal keys filtered out
backend_api.GET /api/safety-brain/status/{user_id} (: PASS - Includes raw_signals for before-decay comparison
backend_api.GET /api/safety-brain/events (returns li: PASS - Returns events array with count
backend_api.GET /api/safety-brain/events (fields): PASS - All required fields present (event_id, user_id, risk_score, risk_level, signals, primary_event, status)
backend_api.Fall detector integration: PASS - POST /sensors/fall feeds signal to Safety Brain via on_fall_detected hook
backend_api.Voice detector integration: PASS - POST /sensors/voice-distress feeds signal to Safety Brain via on_voice_distress hook

frontend_ui.nav-safety-brain: PASS - Safety Brain nav link in sidebar
frontend_ui.risk-gauge: PASS - SVG gauge with needle rotation showing current score
frontend_ui.risk-score-card: PASS - Current Risk Level card with gauge
frontend_ui.signal-bar-fall: PASS - Fall signal bar with weight display
frontend_ui.signal-bar-voice: PASS - Voice signal bar with weight display
frontend_ui.signal-bar-route: PASS - Route signal bar with weight display
frontend_ui.signal-bar-wander: PASS - Wander signal bar with weight display
frontend_ui.signal-bar-pickup: PASS - Pickup signal bar with weight display

emergency_map_integration.safety-brain-card: CODE VERIFIED - Shows for dangerous/critical events with risk score, level, signals breakdown
emergency_map_integration.safety-brain-marker: CODE VERIFIED - Circular marker with percentage, dashed border, pulsing for critical
emergency_map_integration.fly-to-safety-brain-btn: CODE VERIFIED - Focus on Event button to fly map to location
emergency_map_integration.safetyBrainEvent prop: PASS - Passed from FamilyDashboard to EmergencyMap component

sse_handlers.safety_risk_alert: IMPLEMENTED - Toast notification, setSafetyBrainEvent state update
sse_handlers.safety-brain-banner: IMPLEMENTED - Red/orange/amber banner for dangerous/critical/suspicious events

risk_computation.normal_no_event: Normal level does NOT create safety_events record

critical_code_review_comments: Signal weights correctly implemented: fall 35%, voice 30%, route 15%, wander 10%, pickup 10%
Risk thresholds correctly implemented: Normal <0.3, Suspicious 0.3-0.6, Dangerous 0.6-0.85, Critical >=0.85
Auto-SOS only triggers at critical level (>=0.85) via trigger_silent_sos()
Normal level correctly returns status='normal' without creating safety_events record
Fall detector integration via on_fall_detected() hook in fall_detection_service.py line 177-179
Voice detector integration via on_voice_distress() hook in voice_distress_service.py line 165-168
Signal decay implemented with exponential decay formula: score * exp(-elapsed / decay_constant)
SSE broadcasts to both user and operators for all safety brain events
EmergencyMap shows Safety Brain marker (circular with percentage) and card with signals breakdown
FamilyDashboard has safety_risk_alert SSE handler with toast and banner display
Redis fallback to in-memory dict (_mem) for signal state storage
seed_data_creation: Multiple safety events created during testing at various risk levels (suspicious, dangerous). Events with critical-level signals triggered auto_sos. Normal-level evaluations verified NOT to create events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safety Brain (Phase 43) fully tested. Backend: POST /safety-brain/evaluate (compute risk), GET /safety-brain/status/{user_id} (decayed state), GET /safety-brain/events (list), POST /safety-brain/{id}/resolve. Weights: fall*0.35 + voice*0.30 + route*0.15 + wander*0.10 + pickup*0.10. Thresholds: Normal <0.3, Suspicious 0.3-0.6, Dangerous 0.6-0.85, Critical >=0.85. Auto-SOS only at critical. Normal level does NOT create events. Detector integrations: on_fall_detected(), on_voice_distress(). Frontend: SafetyBrainDashboard at /family/safety-brain with gauge, signals, events. EmergencyMap has safety-brain-card/marker. FamilyDashboard handles safety_risk_alert SSE with banner. Redis unavailable - uses in-memory fallback.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running - in-memory fallback for signal state storage (intentional design)

verified_features.evaluate_endpoint: Working - Computes weighted risk score, classifies level, creates event for suspicious+, auto_sos for critical
verified_features.status_endpoint: Working - Returns decayed signals and computed risk state
verified_features.events_endpoint: Working - Returns safety events list with all fields, respects limit
verified_features.resolve_endpoint: Working - Updates event status to resolved
verified_features.weight_calculation: Working - fall*0.35 + voice*0.30 + route*0.15 + wander*0.10 + pickup*0.10
verified_features.normal_no_event: Working - Normal level returns status='normal' without creating DB record
verified_features.fall_detector_hook: Working - on_fall_detected() called after fall event
verified_features.voice_detector_hook: Working - on_voice_distress() called after voice alert
verified_features.signal_decay: Working - Exponential decay with per-signal constants
verified_features.sse_safety_risk_alert: Implemented - Broadcasts to user and operators
verified_features.frontend_dashboard: Working - Gauge, signals, events, legend all functional
verified_features.emergency_map_integration: Implemented - Card and marker for dangerous/critical events
verified_features.family_dashboard_banner: Implemented - Colored banner for non-normal events
